description_long: This motorcycle features a classic, retro-inspired design with a matte black fuel tank and matching fenders, accented by chrome and metallic components throughout. The round headlight and analog instrument cluster evoke a vintage aesthetic, while the spoked wheels and dual rear shock absorbers add to its traditional styling. The seat is elongated and slightly contoured, suitable for both rider and passenger, with a rear grab bar for added support. Prominent exhaust pipes run along the right side, finished in silver, and the engine casing is exposed, showcasing mechanical details. The handlebars are wide and slightly raised, equipped with rearview mirrors and turn signals. Subtle branding is visible on the fuel tank, but no license plate is present.
description: A classic-style black motorcycle with chrome accents, spoked wheels, and a round headlight, featuring a vintage design and exposed engine components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round headlight, wide handlebars, and front fender.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the matte black fuel tank, seat, spoked wheels, and engine details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dual exhaust pipes, rear shock absorbers, and taillight assembly.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the exhaust system, engine casing, and overall silhouette.
